title: Tier Nametags [Tier Tagger]
description: Tier Nametags provides aesthetically pleasing in-game tierlist statistics.
body:
# Tier Nametags A Fabric mod that brings clean, detailed tierlist statistics into your game. ![Cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac243a4d2d4ac545727cb51915923e8e2d7137fd_0.webp) ## ✨ Features ### ⚠️ MCTiers support is currently only available in the [1.21 beta version of Tier Nametags](https://modrinth.com/mod/tiernametags/version/1.1.0+mc1.21+beta). - **Easily see anyone's tier**
Tiers displayed directly in nametags, tablist, or the chat. - **Supports multiple tierlists**
Such as MCTiers and OceTiers, with more planned in the future. - **Quick player lookup**
Instantly view anyone's tierlist profile, even if they're offline. - **Built-in leaderboards**
Browse overall and gamemode-specific leaderboards without ever leaving your game. - **Clean and customisable appearance**
Customise how tiers are displayed to your liking. - **Gamemode switching**
Cycle through gamemodes with a keybind. - **Compatibility**
Works alongside existing tiertagger mods, nametag modifying mods like Totem Pop Counter, and client branding such as Feather Client and Lunar Client. ## 📦 Installation No requirements or dependencies other than the mod itself and the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api). ## ⚙️ Usage Keybinds are configurable in Minecraft's control settings.
Base command: `/tiernametags` or `/tn` ### Subcommands Open the leaderboard screen:
`/tn leaderboard`
View a player's full tierlist profile:
`/tn profile `
View a player's tier test history:
`/tn tier_test_history `
Open the settings menu:
`/tn settings`
Switch your selected gamemode or view stats for a specific one:
`/tn gamemode `
